config.description: Tests whether the overlapping stall-token features from the cross-country screen form a reusable suppression regimen.

intervention_specs.name: shared_overlap_top1_fixed_pos
intervention_specs.description: Suppresses shared features at the absolute token position where they were discovered.

intervention_specs.name: shared_overlap_top1_final_token
intervention_specs.description: Suppresses the same layer/feature coordinates at each prompt's final token position.

intervention_specs.name: shared_overlap_top3_fixed_pos
intervention_specs.description: Suppresses shared features at the absolute token position where they were discovered.

intervention_specs.name: shared_overlap_top3_final_token
intervention_specs.description: Suppresses the same layer/feature coordinates at each prompt's final token position.

intervention_specs.name: shared_overlap_fixed_pos

intervention_specs.name: shared_overlap_final_token
intervention_specs.description: Suppresses the same layer/feature coordinates at each prompt's final token position.
